name: dia-cdp
description: Dia browser CDP tools and Codex skill for inspecting the user's Dia session.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Dia browser tabs through CDP.
interface.longDescription: Dia CDP packages a Dia-focused Chrome DevTools Protocol CLI and a Codex skill for inspecting, capturing, debugging, and interacting with pages open in the user's Dia browser session.
defaultPrompt: Dia에서 지금 보고 있는 페이지를 캡처해줘.
